sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_arrays (id, values) VALUES (1, [1, 2, 3]), (2, [4, NULL, 6]), (3, [NULL, NULL, 7]);
SELECT id, indexOf(values, NULL) AS index FROM test_arrays;
UPDATE test_arrays SET values = arrayConcat(values, [8]) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, indexOf(values, 8) AS index FROM test_arrays WHERE indexOf(values, NULL) > 0;
